implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: AC-002: reads build state from FEAT-FORGE-001 state machine
AC-004: empty permitted set + non-terminal -> WAITING
AC-005: presents permitted set + per-stage hints to reasoning model
AC-006: refuses out-of-band reasoning-model choices with warning
AC-008: constitutional veto on PR-review auto-approve
AC-009: routes to specialist / subprocess / autobuild_async / PR-review
AC-010: records every turn's outcome in stage_log with rationale
AC-011: concurrent builds with no shared mutable state
AC-012: unit tests for happy path, refusal, sequencing, constitutional veto
AC-013: integration test for two concurrent builds without cross-talk

completion_promises.criterion_text: Supervisor.next_turn(build_id: str) -> TurnOutcome method exists at src/forge/pipeline/supervisor.py
completion_promises.evidence: Created src/forge/pipeline/supervisor.py exporting Supervisor class with async next_turn(build_id) method returning TurnReport (carrying TurnOutcome). TestSupervisorExists asserts module importability, presence of next_turn, and the full set of TurnOutcome members.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Reads current build state from FEAT-FORGE-001's state machine
completion_promises.evidence: Supervisor injects a StateMachineReader Protocol; next_turn calls state_reader.get_build_state(build_id) as step 1. TestStateMachineRead exercises all three terminal states (COMPLETE, FAILED, CANCELLED) yielding TurnOutcome.TERMINAL.

Step 2 of next_turn calls self.ordering_guard.next_dispatchable(build_id, self.ordering_stage_log_reader) and snapshots into a frozenset for downstream use. TestPermittedSetWiring asserts PRODUCT_OWNER appears in the permitted set at build start.

completion_promises.criterion_text: If permitted set is empty and build is in non-terminal state, returns TurnOutcome.WAITING
completion_promises.evidence: Conditional `if not permitted_stages` branch returns TurnReport(outcome=TurnOutcome.WAITING). TestWaitingOutcome.test_empty_permitted_with_running_state_yields_waiting injects a stub guard returning empty set with build state PAUSED and asserts the WAITING outcome.

completion_promises.criterion_text: If permitted set non-empty, presents the set to the reasoning model with the per-stage dispatch context (forward-propagation hints from TASK-MAG7-002) and parses the chosen dispatch
completion_promises.evidence: next_turn step 3 invokes reasoning_model.choose_dispatch with permitted_stages, stage_hints (TASK-MAG7-002 forward-propagation hints injected via Supervisor.stage_hints), feature_catalogue, build_state, and build_id. Returns DispatchChoice. TestReasoningModelInvocation.test_reasoning_model_receives_stage_hints asserts hints flow through.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Refuses to act on any reasoning-model choice outside the permitted set (executor-layer enforcement; logs structured warning)
completion_promises.evidence: Step 4 of next_turn checks `if choice.stage not in permitted_stages` and returns TurnOutcome.REFUSED_OUT_OF_BAND with a logger.warning() that cites ADR-ARCH-026. TestOutOfBandRefusal.test_out_of_band_choice_yields_refused_out_of_band and test_out_of_band_refusal_emits_warning_log assert both behaviours; specialist_dispatcher.calls == [] proves no dispatch occurred.

completion_promises.criterion_text: For AUTOBUILD choices, calls PerFeatureLoopSequencer.may_start_autobuild first; if False, returns TurnOutcome.WAITING_PRIOR_AUTOBUILD
completion_promises.evidence: Step 5 of next_turn: when choice.stage is StageClass.AUTOBUILD, calls per_feature_sequencer.may_start_autobuild(...). False -> TurnOutcome.WAITING_PRIOR_AUTOBUILD. TestPerFeatureSequencerGate.test_autobuild_blocked_when_sibling_in_flight verifies; the companion test asserts dispatch when no sibling in flight.

completion_promises.criterion_text: For PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW gate decisions, applies ConstitutionalGuard veto_auto_approve before recording any auto-approve decision
completion_promises.evidence: Step 6: when choice.stage is PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW and choice.auto_approve is True, calls constitutional_guard.veto_auto_approve(stage). Verdict REFUSED -> TurnOutcome.REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL. TestConstitutionalVeto.test_pr_review_auto_approve_refused_constitutional asserts pr_review_gate.submissions remains empty and the AutoApproveDecision is captured on the report.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Routes the dispatch to the appropriate dispatcher: PRODUCT_OWNER/ARCHITECT -> specialist, SYSTEM_ARCH/SYSTEM_DESIGN/FEATURE_SPEC/FEATURE_PLAN -> subprocess, AUTOBUILD -> autobuild_async, PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW -> gate decision
completion_promises.evidence: Supervisor._dispatch routes by stage class using pre-computed _SPECIALIST_STAGES and _SUBPROCESS_STAGES frozensets, plus explicit branches for AUTOBUILD (autobuild_dispatcher sync call) and PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW (pr_review_gate.submit_decision). TestDispatchRouting has six tests, one per route, asserting the correct dispatcher was invoked with the correct kwargs.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Records every turn's outcome in stage_log with full rationale
completion_promises.evidence: Every code path in next_turn calls self._record_safe(report) before returning, which forwards to turn_recorder.record_turn(...) with outcome, permitted_stages, chosen_stage, chosen_feature_id, rationale, and gate_verdict. TestTurnLogging.test_dispatched_turn_persists_row + test_refused_turn_persists_row assert rows are written; test_recorder_failure_does_not_propagate proves recorder errors do not break the turn (logged + swallowed).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Concurrent builds: each build_id gets its own independent next_turn invocation; no shared mutable state across builds
completion_promises.evidence: Supervisor is a frozen-shape dataclass holding only injected dependencies (no per-build dicts/lists). Every method takes build_id explicitly. TestConcurrentBuilds.test_supervisor_holds_no_per_build_state and test_concurrent_dispatch_does_not_cross_talk run two next_turn calls (the latter via asyncio.gather) and assert each maps to its own build_id without cross-contamination.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests with mocked guards + dispatchers covering: full happy path, reasoning-model picks non-permitted stage (refused), per-feature sequencing kicks in, constitutional veto fires on PR-review
completion_promises.evidence: tests/forge/test_supervisor.py contains 29 tests organised into 11 acceptance-criterion-aligned classes. Happy paths covered in TestDispatchRouting (six dispatch routes); refusal in TestOutOfBandRefusal; sequencing in TestPerFeatureSequencerGate; constitutional veto in TestConstitutionalVeto. All collaborators are in-memory fakes (FakeStateMachineReader, FakeOrderingStageLogReader, FakePerFeatureStageLogReader, FakeAsyncTaskReader, RecordingReasoningModel, RecordingTurnRecorder, RecordingDispatcher, RecordingPRReviewGate).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Integration test (mock-substrate): two concurrent builds, supervisor dispatches both without cross-talk
completion_promises.evidence: TestConcurrentDispatchIntegration.test_two_concurrent_builds_dispatch_independently uses asyncio.gather to run two concurrent next_turn calls. build-1 reaches AUTOBUILD on FEAT-1, build-2 starts at PRODUCT_OWNER. Asserts both outcomes are DISPATCHED, autobuild_dispatcher saw exactly one call scoped to build-1, and specialist_dispatcher saw exactly one call scoped to build-2. Group F @concurrency scenario covered.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: New files follow the project's Python style (PEP 8, type hints throughout, max line 88, snake_case functions, PascalCase classes, docstrings on every public symbol). The full pytest suite (1324 tests) passes with no errors. Imports are restricted to standard library and existing forge.pipeline modules — no new dependencies introduced.
